# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_database_security

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the resources
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: "AzureSQL2024!"

variables:
  sqlServerName: "staging-sqlserver-$(deployment().name)"
  sqlDatabaseName: "staging-database"
  sqlAdminUsername: "sqladmin"
  allowedIPs:
    - "192.168.1.100"
    - "192.168.1.101"
    - "192.168.1.102"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02-preview"
    name: "[variables('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[variables('sqlAdminUsername')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      publicNetworkAccess: "Enabled"
    tags:
      Environment: "Staging"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02-preview"
    name: "AllowAllAzureServices"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02-preview"
    name: "AllowDevIP1"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[variables('allowedIPs')[0]]"
      endIpAddress: "[variables('allowedIPs')[0]]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02-preview"
    name: "AllowDevIP2"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[variables('allowedIPs')[1]]"
      endIpAddress: "[variables('allowedIPs')[1]]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02-preview"
    name: "AllowDevIP3"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[variables('allowedIPs')[2]]"
      endIpAddress: "[variables('allowedIPs')[2]]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 1073741824
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
